author: Kolpa4
description: Experimental patch for per-node local graph depth. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Kolpa4
manifest.description: Experimental patch for per-node local graph depth.
manifest.name: Expansive Local Graph

name: Expansive Local Graph

releases.author: Kolpa4
releases.description:
Adds “Expand here (+1)”, “Reduce here (‑1)”, and branch reset actions to the Local Graph node context menu.

Lets you manually expand specific branches of the Local Graph beyond the built‑in depth limit.

Renders extra notes and links as a non‑destructive PIXI overlay, without touching Obsidian’s native graph data.

Supports nested expansions, so overlay nodes can themselves become roots of new expanded branches.

Preserves relative positions of expanded overlay nodes across graph rerenders and node dragging.

Uses distinct colors per branch to visually separate different expansions and overlapping neighborhoods.

Draws highlight rings around branch roots to show which nodes have active expansions.

Keeps all state per Local Graph view, so different graph panes can have independent expansions.
releases.name: Expansive local graph 1.0.0 – initial release
